description: Trigger + expectation evals for the Compliance Officer persona. Attack A1/A2 defense: LLM cannot claim compliance-officer role without emitting registered AA codes + registry-resolvable CFR citations.

positive.prompt: Draft an adverse-action letter for a denied loan applicant citing FICO below policy floor
positive.reason: AA01 + Reg B §1002.9(b)(2) is compliance-officer core work

positive.prompt: Does this loan denial comply with CFPB Circular 2022-03 for complex algorithms?
positive.reason: Circular 2022-03 is baked into persona anchors

positive.prompt: Review whether this AI-generated adverse-action notice meets Reg B §1002.9(b)(2) specificity
Should the AA05 fair-lending flag block auto-approval?

negative.prompt: Screen this loan for BSA OFAC compliance
Compute VaR at 95% for portfolio concentration
Draft the customer-facing explanation of the denial
Is this CRE sector exposure late-cycle risk?
negative.reason: Macro sector risk routes to contrarian

negative.prompt: Size this trading position given p_win=0.55 and 2:1 R:R

expectations.reason: Every adverse-action notice maps to a registered AA code per CFPB Bulletin 2024-09
Every regulatory claim must anchor to a section resolvable in lib/schemas/citation-registry.json (red-team A1 defense)
Loredana 2026-06-19 binding: FICO<700 is credit-eligibility floor failure, not repayment signal
AA05 requires human review per CFPB Bulletin 2024-09
SR 11-7 rescinded 2026-04-17; personas must not cite it as current (red-team A3 defense)
